title: Stray SQLite DB (books.db) left in workspace
evidence: books.db present in run_dir; created by module-level init_db() at app.py:216 on import
suggestion: Add books.db to .gitignore or create the DB lazily; don't commit runtime data files

title: init_db() runs as an import-time side effect
evidence: app.py:216 calls init_db() at module top level, so importing app writes books.db to the module directory
suggestion: Guard DB creation behind a factory/CLI entrypoint or app startup hook instead of import time

title: Non-JSON POST/PUT bodies may raise 415 rather than the intended 400
evidence: app.py:76,169 call request.get_json() without silent=True; a request lacking application/json content-type triggers Werkzeug UnsupportedMediaType (415), not the 400 the code below assumes; untested (all tests send application/json)
suggestion: Use request.get_json(silent=True) so malformed/missing bodies fall through to the explicit 400 handler

title: Coverage 98%, not 100%
evidence: scores.json test_coverage=0.98; a few defensive branches (e.g. non-JSON body error paths) are unexercised
suggestion: Add tests for the empty/non-JSON body 400 paths to close the gap
